text: アイテムトレードについて

Trading

You can trade meseta and up to ten items at a time with other players.
Please note that if you or the player you are trading with are no longer able
to trade (for example, if either of the characters move out of range),
the trade will be canceled.

See the Online Manual for more information.
Click the following link to open it in your browser.
